name: build
description: The dbt build command will: run models, test tests, snapshot snapshots. Used to build and test your dbt project.

name: compile
description: dbt compile generates executable SQL from source model, test, and analysis files. Useful for visually inspecting compiled output and validating Jinja logic.

name: docs
description: The docs command is responsible for generating your project's documentation website.

name: list
description: List the resources in your dbt project.

name: parse
description: The dbt parse command parses and validates the contents of your dbt project. If your project contains Jinja or YAML syntax errors, the command will fail.

name: run
description: dbt run executes compiled sql model files against the current target database.

name: test
description: dbt test runs data tests defined on models, sources, snapshots, and seeds and unit tests defined on SQL models.

name: show
description: dbt show executes an arbitrary SQL statement against the database and returns the results. Useful for debugging and inspecting data.

name: get_lineage_dev
description: Retrieves the lineage of a specific dbt resource from the local development manifest. Returns both upstream (parents) and downstream (children) dependencies.

name: get_node_details_dev
description: Retrieves detailed information about a specific dbt node from the local development manifest using dbt ls --output json. Works for models, seeds, snapshots, sources, and other dbt resource types.

name: list_metrics
description: List all metrics from the dbt Semantic Layer.

name: list_saved_queries
description: List all saved queries from the dbt Semantic Layer. Saved queries are pre-defined queries that have been saved in the Semantic Layer.

name: get_dimensions
description: Get the dimensions for specified metrics.

name: get_entities
description: Get the entities for specified metrics.

name: query_metrics
description: Queries the dbt Semantic Layer to answer business questions from the data warehouse.

name: get_metrics_compiled_sql
description: Gets compiled SQL for given metrics and dimensions/entities from the dbt Semantic Layer.

name: get_mart_models
description: Get the name and description of all mart models in the environment. A mart model is part of the presentation layer of the dbt project.

name: get_all_models
description: Get the name and description of all dbt models in the environment.

name: get_model_details
description: Retrieves information about a specific dbt model, including compiled SQL, description, database, schema, alias, and column details.

name: get_model_parents
description: Get the parent resources of a specific dbt model.

name: get_model_children
description: Get the child resources of a specific dbt model.

name: get_model_health
description: Get health and test status for a specific dbt model.

name: get_model_performance
description: Get model execution performance metrics from historical runs.

name: get_lineage
description: Retrieves the lineage graph for a dbt resource. Returns all nodes connected to the specified resource, including both upstream dependencies and downstream dependents.

name: get_all_sources
description: Get the name, description, and metadata of all dbt sources in the environment. Sources represent external data tables that your dbt models build upon.

name: get_source_details
description: Get detailed information about a specific dbt source.

name: get_exposures
description: Get the id, name, description, and url of all exposures in the dbt environment.

name: get_exposure_details
description: Get detailed information about a specific dbt exposure.

name: get_all_macros
description: Get the name and description of all dbt macros in the environment.

name: get_macro_details
description: Get detailed information about a specific dbt macro.

name: get_seed_details
description: Get detailed information about a specific dbt seed.

name: get_semantic_model_details
description: Get detailed information about a specific dbt semantic model.

name: get_snapshot_details
description: Get detailed information about a specific dbt snapshot.

name: get_test_details
description: Get detailed information about a specific dbt test.

name: list_projects
description: List all active projects in the dbt Cloud account.

name: list_jobs
description: List all jobs in a dbt platform account with optional filtering.

name: get_job_details
description: Get detailed information for a specific dbt job, including execution settings, triggers, and scheduling information.

name: get_project_details
description: Get detailed information for a specific dbt project.

name: trigger_job_run
description: Trigger a dbt job run with optional parameter overrides.

name: list_jobs_runs
description: List historical runs for dbt jobs.

name: get_job_run_details
description: Get detailed information about a specific dbt job run.

name: cancel_job_run
description: Cancel a currently running or queued dbt run.

name: retry_job_run
description: Retry a failed dbt job run.

name: list_job_run_artifacts
description: List artifacts for a specific dbt job run.

name: get_job_run_artifact
description: Get a specific artifact from a dbt job run.

name: get_job_run_error
description: Get the error details for a failed dbt job run.

name: generate_source
description: Generate dbt source YAML for a given database table.

name: generate_model_yaml
description: Generate dbt model YAML documentation.

name: generate_staging_model
description: Generate a dbt staging model SQL file.

name: get_column_lineage
description: Get column-level lineage for a dbt model.

name: search_product_docs
description: Search dbt product documentation at docs.getdbt.com.

name: get_product_doc_pages
description: Get specific pages from dbt product documentation.

name: get_mcp_server_version
description: Get the version of the dbt MCP server.

name: get_mcp_server_branch
description: Get the branch of the dbt MCP server.
